instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The former account I have made, O Theophilus, concerning all the things that Jesus began both to do and to teach,
output: En el primer relato, oh Teófilo, hablé acerca de todas las cosas que Jesús comenzó a hacer y a enseñar,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Until the day on which He was taken up, after He had given commandment through the Holy Spirit to the apostles whom He chose;
output: hasta el día en que fue llevado arriba, después de haber dado mandamientos por el Espíritu Santo a los apóstoles que había escogido;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To whom also He presented Himself alive after His suffering by many irrefutable proofs, appearing to them through a period of forty days and speaking the things concerning the kingdom of God.
output: a quienes también, después de haber padecido, se presentó vivo con muchas pruebas indubitables, apareciéndoseles durante cuarenta días y hablándoles de lo tocante al reino de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And as He met together with them, He charged them not to depart from Jerusalem, but to wait for the promise of the Father, which, He said, You heard from Me;
output: Y estando reunido con ellos, les mandó que no se fueran de Jerusalén, sino que esperasen la promesa del Padre, la cual, les dijo, oísteis de Mí.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For John baptized with water, but you shall be baptized in the Holy Spirit not many days from now.
output: Porque Juan bautizó con agua, mas vosotros seréis bautizados en el Espíritu Santo dentro de no muchos días.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So the ones who came together asked Him, saying, Lord, are You at this time restoring the kingdom to Israel?
output: Entonces los que se habían reunido le preguntaron, diciendo: Señor, ¿restaurarás el reino a Israel en este tiempo?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But He said to them, It is not for you to know times or seasons which the Father has set by His own authority.
output: Pero Él les dijo: No os toca a vosotros saber los tiempos o las estaciones que el Padre dispuso por Su propia autoridad;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But you shall receive power when the Holy Spirit comes upon you, and you shall be My witnesses both in Jerusalem and in all Judea and Samaria and unto the uttermost part of the earth.
output: pero recibiréis poder, cuando haya venido sobre vosotros el Espíritu Santo, y seréis Mis testigos en Jerusalén, en toda Judea, en Samaria, y hasta lo último de la tierra.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when He had said these things, while they were looking on, He was lifted up, and a cloud took Him away from their sight.
output: Y habiendo dicho estas cosas, viéndolo ellos, fue alzado, y le recibió una nube que le ocultó de sus ojos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And while they were looking intently into heaven as He went, behold, two men in white clothing stood beside them,
output: Y estando ellos con los ojos puestos en el cielo, mientras Él se iba, he aquí se pusieron junto a ellos dos varones con vestiduras blancas,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who also said, Men of Galilee, why do you stand looking into heaven? This Jesus, who has been taken up from you into heaven, will come in the same way as you beheld Him going into heaven.
output: los cuales también les dijeron: Varones de Galilea, ¿por qué os quedáis mirando al cielo? Este Jesús, que ha sido tomado de vosotros al cielo, vendrá de la misma manera que le habéis visto ir al cielo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Then they returned to Jerusalem from the mount called Olivet, which is near Jerusalem, a Sabbath day’s journey away.
output: Entonces volvieron a Jerusalén desde el monte que se llama del Olivar, el cual está cerca de Jerusalén, camino de un día de Sábado.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when they entered, they went up to the upper room where they were residing, Peter and John and James and Andrew, Philip and Thomas, Bartholomew and Matthew, James the son of Alphaeus and Simon the Zealot and Judas the brother of James.
output: Y entrados, subieron al aposento alto, donde moraban Pedro y Juan y Jacobo y Andrés, Felipe y Tomás, Bartolomé y Mateo, Jacobo hijo de Alfeo, Simón el Zelote y Judas hermano de Jacobo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These all continued steadfastly with one accord in prayer, together with the women and Mary the mother of Jesus, and with His brothers.
output: Todos éstos perseveraban unánimes en oración, con las mujeres, y con María la madre de Jesús, y con Sus hermanos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And in those days Peter stood up in the midst of the brothers and said (there was a group of persons gathered together, about a hundred and twenty),
output: Y en aquellos días Pedro se levantó en medio de los hermanos (un grupo como de ciento veinte estaba reunido allí), y dijo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Men, brothers, the Scripture had to be fulfilled, which the Holy Spirit spoke before through the mouth of David concerning Judas, who became a guide to those who seized Jesus;
output: Varones hermanos, era necesario que se cumpliese la Escritura, en que el Espíritu Santo habló antes por boca de David acerca de Judas, quien se hizo guía de los que prendieron a Jesús;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For he was numbered among us and was allotted his portion of this ministry.
output: por cuanto era contado con nosotros, y se le asignó una porción de este ministerio.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: (Now this man acquired a piece of land with the wages of unrighteousness; and falling headlong, he burst in the middle, and all his inward parts gushed out.
output: Éste, pues, con salario de injusticia adquirió un campo, y cayendo de cabeza, se reventó por la mitad, y todas sus entrañas se derramaron.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And it became known to all those dwelling in Jerusalem, so that that piece of land was called in their own dialect, Akeldamach, that is, Field of Blood.)
output: Y fue notorio a todos los habitantes de Jerusalén, de tal manera que aquel campo se llama en su propia lengua Acéldama, que quiere decir, Campo de sangre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For it is written in the book of Psalms, “Let his habitation become desolate, and let no one dwell in it”; and, “His overseership let another take.”
output: Porque está escrito en el libro de los Salmos: “Sea hecha desierta su habitación, y no haya quien more en ella”; y: “Tome otro su cargo”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: It is necessary therefore that of the men who accompanied us all the time in which the Lord Jesus went in and went out among us,
output: Es necesario, pues, que de estos hombres que nos han acompañado todo el tiempo que el Señor Jesús entraba y salía entre nosotros,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Beginning from the baptism of John until the day on which He was taken up from us, one of these should become a witness of His resurrection with us.
output: comenzando desde el bautismo de Juan hasta el día en que de entre nosotros fue llevado arriba, uno sea hecho testigo con nosotros de Su resurrección.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they proposed two, Joseph, called Barsabbas, who was surnamed Justus, and Matthias.
output: Y propusieron a dos: a José, llamado Barsabás, que tenía por sobrenombre Justo, y a Matías.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they prayed and said, You Lord, Knower of the hearts of all, show us clearly the one whom You have chosen of these two
output: Y orando, dijeron: Tú, Señor, que conoces los corazones de todos, muestra cuál de estos dos has escogido,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To take the place of this ministry and apostleship, from which Judas turned aside to go to his own place.
output: para que tome la parte de este ministerio y apostolado, de que se desvió Judas para irse a su propio lugar.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they cast lots for them, and the lot fell on Matthias; and he was counted with the eleven apostles.
output: Y les echaron suertes, y la suerte cayó sobre Matías; y fue contado con los once apóstoles.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy the brother,
output: Pablo, apóstol de Cristo Jesús por la voluntad de Dios, y el hermano Timoteo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To the saints in Colossae and faithful brothers in Christ: Grace to you and peace from God our Father.
output: a los santos que están en Colosas, fieles hermanos en Cristo: Gracia y paz sean a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: We give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always concerning you,
output: Siempre orando por vosotros, damos gracias a Dios, Padre de nuestro Señor Jesucristo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because we have heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and the love which you have unto all the saints
output: habiendo oído de vuestra fe en Cristo Jesús, y del amor que tenéis a todos los santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because of the hope laid up for you in the heavens, of which you heard before in the word of the truth of the gospel,
output: a causa de la esperanza que os está guardada en los cielos, de la cual antes oísteis en la palabra de la verdad del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which has come to you, even as it is also in all the world, bearing fruit and growing, as also in you, since the day you heard and knew the grace of God in truth;
output: que ha llegado hasta vosotros, así como a todo el mundo, y lleva fruto y crece también en vosotros, desde el día que oísteis y conocisteis la gracia de Dios en verdad,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as you learned from Epaphras, our beloved fellow slave, who is a faithful minister of Christ on your behalf,
output: como lo habéis aprendido de Epafras, nuestro consiervo amado, que es un fiel ministro de Cristo a favor vuestro,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who also has made known to us your love in the Spirit.
output: quien también nos hizo saber vuestro amor en el Espíritu.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore we also, since the day we heard of it, do not cease praying and asking on your behalf that you may be filled with the full knowledge of His will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,
output: Por lo cual también nosotros, desde el día que lo oímos, no cesamos de orar por vosotros, y de pedir que seáis llenos del pleno conocimiento de Su voluntad en toda sabiduría y entendimiento espirituales,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To walk worthily of the Lord to please Him in all things, bearing fruit in every good work and growing by the full knowledge of God,
output: para que andéis como es digno del Señor, agradándole en todo, llevando fruto en toda buena obra, y creciendo por el pleno conocimiento de Dios;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Being empowered with all power, according to the might of His glory, unto all endurance and long-suffering with joy,
output: fortalecidos con todo poder, conforme a la potencia de Su gloria, para toda perseverancia y longanimidad con gozo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Giving thanks to the Father, who has qualified you for a share of the allotted portion of the saints in the light;
output: dando gracias al Padre que os hizo aptos para participar de la porción de los santos en la luz;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who delivered us out of the authority of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son of His love,
output: el cual nos ha librado de la autoridad de las tinieblas, y trasladado al reino del Hijo de Su amor,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins;
output: en quien tenemos redención, el perdón de pecados.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who is the image of the invisible God, the Firstborn of all creation,
output: Él es la imagen del Dios invisible, el Primogénito de toda creación.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because in Him all things were created, in the heavens and on the earth, the visible and the invisible, whether thrones or lordships or rulers or authorities; all things have been created through Him and unto Him.
output: Porque en Él fueron creadas todas las cosas, las que hay en los cielos y las que hay en la tierra, visibles e invisibles; sean tronos, sean señoríos, sean principados, sean autoridades; todo fue creado por medio de Él y para Él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He is before all things, and all things cohere in Him;
output: Y Él es antes de todas las cosas, y todas las cosas en Él se conservan unidas;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He is the Head of the Body, the church; He is the beginning, the Firstborn from the dead, that He Himself might have the first place in all things;
output: y Él es la Cabeza del Cuerpo que es la iglesia; Él es el principio, el Primogénito de entre los muertos, para que en todo Él tenga la preeminencia;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For in Him all the fullness was pleased to dwell
output: por cuanto agradó a toda la plenitud habitar en Él,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And through Him to reconcile all things to Himself, having made peace through the blood of His cross — through Him, whether the things on the earth or the things in the heavens.
output: y por medio de Él reconciliar consigo todas las cosas, así las que están en la tierra como las que están en los cielos, haciendo la paz mediante la sangre de Su cruz.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And you, though once alienated and enemies in your mind because of your evil works,
output: Y a vosotros también, aunque erais en otro tiempo extraños y enemigos en vuestra mente por vuestras malas obras,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He now has reconciled in the body of His flesh through death, to present you holy and without blemish and without reproach before Him;
output: ahora Él os ha reconciliado en Su cuerpo de carne, por medio de la muerte, para presentaros santos y sin mancha e irreprensibles delante de Él;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: If indeed you continue in the faith, grounded and steadfast and not being moved away from the hope of the gospel, which you heard, which was proclaimed in all creation under heaven, of which I Paul became a minister.
output: si en verdad permanecéis fundados y firmes en la fe, y sin dejaros mover de la esperanza del evangelio que habéis oído, el cual se proclamó en toda la creación que está debajo del cielo; del cual yo Pablo fui hecho ministro.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I now rejoice in my sufferings on your behalf and fill up on my part that which is lacking of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for His Body, which is the church;
output: Ahora me gozo en lo que padezco por vosotros, y de mi parte completo en mi carne lo que falta de las aflicciones de Cristo por Su Cuerpo, que es la iglesia;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Of which I became a minister according to the stewardship of God, which was given to me for you, to complete the word of God,
output: de la cual fui hecho ministro, según la mayordomía de Dios que me fue dada para con vosotros, para completar la palabra de Dios,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The mystery which has been hidden from the ages and from the generations but now has been manifested to His saints;
output: el misterio que había estado oculto desde los siglos y desde las generaciones, pero que ahora ha sido manifestado a Sus santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To whom God willed to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory,
output: a quienes Dios quiso dar a conocer las riquezas de la gloria de este misterio entre los gentiles; que es Cristo en vosotros, la esperanza de gloria,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Whom we announce, admonishing every man and teaching every man in all wisdom that we may present every man full-grown in Christ;
output: a quien anunciamos, amonestando a todo hombre, y enseñando a todo hombre en toda sabiduría, a fin de presentar perfecto en Cristo a todo hombre;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For which also I labor, struggling according to His operation which operates in me in power.
output: para lo cual también trabajo, luchando según la operación de Él, la cual actúa en mí con poder.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, to the saints who are in Ephesus and are faithful in Christ Jesus:
output: Pablo, apóstol de Cristo Jesús por la voluntad de Dios, a los santos que están en Éfeso y que son fieles en Cristo Jesús:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
output: Gracia y paz a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre y del Señor Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us with every spiritual blessing in the heavenlies in Christ,
output: Bendito sea el Dios y Padre de nuestro Señor Jesucristo, que nos bendijo con toda bendición espiritual en los lugares celestiales en Cristo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as He chose us in Him before the foundation of the world to be holy and without blemish before Him in love,
output: según nos escogió en Él antes de la fundación del mundo, para que fuésemos santos y sin mancha delante de Él en amor,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Predestinating us unto sonship through Jesus Christ to Himself, according to the good pleasure of His will,
output: predestinándonos para filiación por medio de Jesucristo para Sí mismo, según el beneplácito de Su voluntad,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To the praise of the glory of His grace, with which He graced us in the Beloved;
output: para alabanza de la gloria de Su gracia, con la cual nos agració en el Amado;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom we have redemption through His blood, the forgiveness of offenses, according to the riches of His grace,
output: en quien tenemos redención por Su sangre, el perdón de los delitos según las riquezas de Su gracia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which He caused to abound to us in all wisdom and prudence,
output: que hizo sobreabundar para con nosotros en toda sabiduría y prudencia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Making known to us the mystery of His will according to His good pleasure, which He purposed in Himself,
output: dándonos a conocer el misterio de Su voluntad, según Su beneplácito, el cual se había propuesto en Sí mismo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Unto the economy of the fullness of the times, to head up all things in Christ, the things in the heavens and the things on the earth, in Him;
output: para la economía de la plenitud de los tiempos, de hacer que en Cristo sean reunidas bajo una cabeza todas las cosas, así las que están en los cielos, como las que están en la tierra, en Él;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom also we were designated as an inheritance, having been predestinated according to the purpose of the One who works all things according to the counsel of His will,
output: en quien también fuimos designados como herencia, habiendo sido predestinados conforme al propósito del que hace todas las cosas según el consejo de Su voluntad,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That we would be to the praise of His glory who have first hoped in Christ,
output: a fin de que seamos para alabanza de Su gloria, nosotros los que primeramente esperábamos en Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom you also, having heard the word of the truth, the gospel of your salvation, in Him also believing, you were sealed with the Holy Spirit of the promise,
output: En Él también vosotros, habiendo oído la palabra de la verdad, el evangelio de vuestra salvación, y en Él habiendo creído, fuisteis sellados con el Espíritu Santo de la promesa,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who is the pledge of our inheritance, unto the redemption of the acquired possession, to the praise of His glory.
output: que es las arras de nuestra herencia, hasta la redención de la posesión adquirida, para alabanza de Su gloria.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore I also, having heard of the faith in the Lord Jesus which is among you and your love to all the saints,
output: Por esta causa también yo, habiendo oído de la fe en el Señor Jesús que está entre vosotros, y de vuestro amor para con todos los santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Do not cease giving thanks for you, making mention of you in my prayers,
output: no ceso de dar gracias por vosotros, haciendo mención de vosotros en mis oraciones,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give to you a spirit of wisdom and revelation in the full knowledge of Him,
output: para que el Dios de nuestro Señor Jesucristo, el Padre de gloria, os dé espíritu de sabiduría y de revelación en el pleno conocimiento de Él,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The eyes of your heart having been enlightened, that you may know what is the hope of His calling, and what are the riches of the glory of His inheritance in the saints,
output: para que, alumbrados los ojos de vuestro corazón, sepáis cuál es la esperanza a que Él os ha llamado, y cuáles las riquezas de la gloria de Su herencia en los santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And what is the surpassing greatness of His power toward us who believe, according to the operation of the might of His strength,
output: y cuál la supereminente grandeza de Su poder para con nosotros los que creemos, según la operación del poder de Su fuerza,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which He caused to operate in Christ in raising Him from the dead and seating Him at His right hand in the heavenlies,
output: que hizo operar en Cristo, resucitándole de los muertos y sentándole a Su diestra en los lugares celestiales,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Far above all rule and authority and power and lordship and every name that is named not only in this age but also in that which is to come;
output: por encima de todo principado y autoridad y poder y señorío, y sobre todo nombre que se nombra, no sólo en este siglo, sino también en el venidero;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He subjected all things under His feet and gave Him to be Head over all things to the church,
output: y sometió todas las cosas bajo Sus pies, y lo dio por Cabeza sobre todas las cosas a la iglesia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which is His Body, the fullness of the One who fills all in all.
output: la cual es Su Cuerpo, la plenitud de Aquel que todo lo llena en todo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul, an apostle (not from men nor through man but through Jesus Christ and God the Father, who raised Him from the dead),
output: Pablo, apóstol (no de parte de hombres ni por hombre, sino por Jesucristo y por Dios el Padre, que lo resucitó de los muertos),

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And all the brothers who are with me, to the churches of Galatia:
output: y todos los hermanos que están conmigo, a las iglesias de Galacia:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ,
output: Gracia y paz sean a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre y del Señor Jesucristo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who gave Himself for our sins that He might rescue us out of the present evil age according to the will of our God and Father,
output: el cual se dio a Sí mismo por nuestros pecados para rescatarnos del presente siglo maligno, conforme a la voluntad de nuestro Dios y Padre,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To whom be the glory forever and ever. Amen.
output: a quien sea la gloria por los siglos de los siglos. Amén.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I marvel that you are so quickly removing from Him who has called you in the grace of Christ to a different gospel,
output: Estoy maravillado de que tan pronto os estéis alejando del que os llamó en la gracia de Cristo, para seguir un evangelio diferente.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which is not another gospel, only there are some who trouble you and desire to pervert the gospel of Christ.
output: No que haya otro, sino que hay algunos que os perturban y quieren pervertir el evangelio de Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But if even we or an angel out of heaven should announce to you a gospel beyond that which we have announced to you, let him be accursed.
output: Mas si aun nosotros, o un ángel bajado del cielo, os anuncia un evangelio que vaya más allá del que os hemos anunciado, sea anatema.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: As we have said before, now also I say again, If anyone announces to you a gospel beyond that which you have received, let him be accursed.
output: Como antes hemos dicho, también ahora lo repito: Si alguno os anuncia un evangelio que vaya más allá del que habéis recibido, sea anatema.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For am I now trying to win the assent of men or of God? Or am I seeking to please men? If I were still trying to please men, I would not be a slave of Christ.
output: Pues, ¿busco ahora el favor de los hombres, o el de Dios? ¿O trato de agradar a los hombres? Pues si todavía tratara de agradar a los hombres, no sería esclavo de Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For I make known to you, brothers, concerning the gospel announced by me, that it is not according to man.
output: Mas os hago saber, hermanos, que el evangelio anunciado por mí, no es según hombre;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For neither did I receive it from man, nor was I taught it, but I received it through a revelation by Jesus Christ.
output: pues yo ni lo recibí ni lo aprendí de hombre alguno, sino por revelación de Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For you have heard of my manner of life formerly in Judaism, that I persecuted the church of God excessively and ravaged it.
output: Porque habéis oído acerca de mi conducta en otro tiempo en el judaísmo, que perseguía sobremanera a la iglesia de Dios, y la asolaba;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And I advanced in Judaism beyond many contemporaries in my race, being more abundantly a zealot for the traditions of my fathers.
output: y en el judaísmo aventajaba a muchos de mis contemporáneos en mi nación, siendo mucho más celoso de las tradiciones de mis padres.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But when it pleased God, who set me apart from my mother’s womb and called me through His grace,
output: Pero cuando agradó a Dios, que me apartó desde el vientre de mi madre, y me llamó por Su gracia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To reveal His Son in me that I might announce Him as the gospel among the Gentiles, immediately I did not confer with flesh and blood,
output: revelar a Su Hijo en mí, para que yo le anunciase como evangelio entre los gentiles, no consulté en seguida con carne y sangre,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Neither did I go up to Jerusalem to those who were apostles before me, but I went away to Arabia and again returned to Damascus.
output: ni subí a Jerusalén a los que eran apóstoles antes que yo; sino que fui a Arabia, y volví de nuevo a Damasco.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Cephas, and I remained with him fifteen days.
output: Después, pasados tres años, subí a Jerusalén para visitar a Cefas, y permanecí con él quince días;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But I saw none of the other apostles except James, the brother of the Lord.
output: pero no vi a ningún otro de los apóstoles, sino a Jacobo el hermano del Señor.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Now concerning the things which I am writing to you, behold, before God, I am not lying.
output: En esto que os escribo, he aquí delante de Dios que no miento.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Then I went into the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
output: Después fui a las regiones de Siria y de Cilicia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Yet I was still unknown by face to the churches of Judea, which are in Christ.
output: pero todavía no era conocido de vista en las iglesias de Judea, que están en Cristo;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But they only heard this: He who was formerly persecuting us is now announcing as the gospel the faith which formerly he ravaged.
output: solamente oían decir: Aquel que en otro tiempo nos perseguía, ahora anuncia como evangelio la fe que en otro tiempo asolaba.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they glorified God because of me.
output: Y glorificaban a Dios por causa de mí.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: God, having spoken of old in many portions and in many ways to the fathers in the prophets,
output: Dios, habiendo hablado en muchas ocasiones y de muchas maneras en tiempos pasados a los padres en los profetas,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Has at the last of these days spoken to us in the Son, whom He appointed Heir of all things, through whom also He made the universe;
output: al final de estos días nos ha hablado en el Hijo, a quien constituyó Heredero de todo, y por quien asimismo hizo el universo;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who, being the effulgence of His glory and the impress of His substance and upholding and bearing all things by the word of His power, having made purification of sins, sat down on the right hand of the Majesty on high;
output: el cual, siendo el resplandor de Su gloria, y la impronta de Su sustancia, y quien sustenta y sostiene todas las cosas con la palabra de Su poder, habiendo efectuado la purificación de los pecados, se sentó a la diestra de la Majestad en las alturas,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Having become as much better than the angels as to have inherited a more distinguished name than they.
output: hecho tanto superior a los ángeles, cuanto heredó más destacado nombre que ellos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For to which of the angels has He ever said, “You are My Son; this day have I begotten You”? And again, “I will be a Father to Him, and He will be a Son to Me”?
output: Porque ¿a cuál de los ángeles dijo Dios jamás: “Mi Hijo eres Tú, Yo te he engendrado hoy”, y otra vez: “Yo seré a Él Padre y Él me será a Mí Hijo”?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when He brings again the Firstborn into the inhabited earth, He says, “And let all the angels of God worship Him.”
output: Y cuando trae de nuevo al Primogénito a la tierra habitada, dice: “Adórenle todos los ángeles de Dios”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And of the angels He says, “Who makes His angels winds and His ministers a flame of fire”;
output: Y de los ángeles dice: “El que hace a Sus ángeles vientos, y a Sus ministros llama de fuego”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But of the Son, “Your throne, O God, is forever and ever, and the scepter of uprightness is the scepter of Your kingdom.
output: Mas del Hijo dice: “Tu trono, oh Dios, es por los siglos de los siglos; cetro de rectitud es el cetro de Tu reino.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: You have loved righteousness and hated lawlessness; therefore God, Your God, has anointed You with the oil of exultant joy above Your partners”;
output: Has amado la justicia, y aborrecido la iniquidad, por lo cual te ungió Dios, el Dios Tuyo, con óleo de júbilo más que a Tus socios”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And, “You in the beginning, Lord, laid the foundation of the earth, and the heavens are the works of Your hands;
output: Y: “Tú, oh Señor, en el principio fundaste la tierra, y los cielos son obra de Tus manos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: They will perish, but You remain perpetually; and they all will become old like a garment,
output: Ellos perecerán, mas Tú permaneces para siempre; y todos ellos se envejecerán como una vestidura,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And like a mantle You will roll them up; like a garment they will also be changed; but You are the same, and Your years will not fail.”
output: y como un manto los envolverás, y serán mudados como un vestido; pero Tú eres el mismo, y Tus años no acabarán”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But to which of the angels has He ever said, “Sit at My right hand until I set Your enemies as a footstool for Your feet”?
output: Pues, ¿a cuál de los ángeles dijo Dios jamás: “Siéntate a Mi diestra, hasta que ponga a Tus enemigos por estrado de Tus pies?”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Are they not all ministering spirits, sent forth for service for the sake of those who are to inherit salvation?
output: ¿No son todos espíritus ministradores, enviados para servicio a favor de los que han de heredar la salvación?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: James, a slave of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ, to the twelve tribes in the dispersion: Rejoice!
output: Jacobo, esclavo de Dios y del Señor Jesucristo, a las doce tribus que están en la dispersión: ¡Regocijaos!

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Count it all joy, my brothers, whenever you fall into various trials,
output: Hermanos míos, tened por sumo gozo cuando os halléis en diversas pruebas,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Knowing that the proving of your faith works out endurance.
output: sabiendo que la prueba de vuestra fe produce perseverancia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And let endurance have its perfect work that you may be perfect and entire, lacking in nothing.
output: Mas tenga la perseverancia su obra perfecta, para que seáis perfectos y cabales, sin que os falte cosa alguna.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But if any one of you lacks wisdom, let him ask of God, who gives to all liberally and does not reproach, and it will be given to him.
output: Y si alguno de vosotros tiene falta de sabiduría, pídala a Dios, el cual da a todos con liberalidad y sin reproche, y le será dada.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But let him ask in faith, doubting nothing, for he who doubts is like the surge of the sea, driven by the wind and tossed about.
output: Pero pida con fe, no dudando nada; porque el que duda es semejante al oleaje del mar, que es arrastrado por el viento y echado de una parte a otra.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For that man must not suppose that he will receive anything from the Lord;
output: No piense, pues, ese hombre, que recibirá cosa alguna del Señor,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He is a double-souled man, unstable in all his ways.
output: siendo hombre de doble ánimo, inestable en todos sus caminos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And let the lowly brother boast in his exaltation,
output: El hermano de humilde condición, gloríese en su exaltación;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the rich in his being brought low, because like a flower of the grass he will pass away.
output: y el rico, en su humillación; porque él pasará como la flor de la hierba.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For the sun rises with its scorching heat and withers the grass, and its flower falls off, and the beauty of its appearance is destroyed; so also the rich man will fade away in his pursuits.
output: Porque el sol se levanta con calor abrasador y seca la hierba, y su flor se cae, y la hermosura de su apariencia perece; así también se marchitará el rico en todas sus empresas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Blessed is the man who endures trial, because when he has become approved by testing, he will receive the crown of life, which He promised to those who love Him.
output: Bienaventurado el varón que soporta la prueba; porque una vez aprobado, recibirá la corona de vida, que el Señor ha prometido a los que le aman.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Let no one say when he is tempted, I am tempted of God; for God cannot be tempted of evil, and He Himself tempts no one.
output: Cuando alguno es tentado, no diga que es tentado de parte de Dios; porque Dios no puede ser tentado por el mal, ni Él tienta a nadie;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But each one is tempted when he is drawn away and enticed by his own lusts;
output: sino que cada uno es tentado cuando es atraído y seducido por su propia concupiscencia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Then the lust, having conceived, gives birth to sin; and the sin, when it is fully grown, brings forth death.
output: Entonces la concupiscencia, después que ha concebido, da a luz el pecado; y el pecado, siendo consumado, engendra la muerte.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Do not be deceived, my beloved brothers.
output: Amados hermanos míos, no os engañéis.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: All good giving and every perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of lights, with whom is no variation or shadow cast by turning.
output: Toda buena dádiva y todo don perfecto viene de lo alto, y desciende del Padre de las luces, en el cual no hay mudanza, ni oscurecimiento causado por rotación.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He brought us forth by the word of truth, purposing that we might be a kind of firstfruits of His creatures.
output: Él, de Su voluntad, nos engendró por la palabra de verdad, para que seamos en cierto modo primicias de Sus criaturas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: You know this, my beloved brothers; but let every man be quick to hear, slow to speak, slow to wrath;
output: Sabéis esto, mis amados hermanos. Pero que cada uno sea pronto para oír, tardo para hablar, tardo para airarse;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For the wrath of man does not accomplish the righteousness of God.
output: porque la ira del hombre no cumple la justicia de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore putting away all filthiness and the abundance of malice, receive in meekness the implanted word, which is able to save your souls.
output: Por lo cual, desechando toda inmundicia y abundancia de malicia, recibid con mansedumbre la palabra implantada, la cual puede salvar vuestras almas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And become doers of the word and not hearers only, who delude themselves.
output: Y sed hacedores de la palabra, no tan solamente oidores, engañándoos a vosotros mismos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because if anyone is a hearer of the word and not a doer, this one is like a man considering in a mirror the face he was born with;
output: Porque si alguno es oidor de la palabra pero no hacedor de ella, éste es semejante al hombre que considera en un espejo el rostro con el cual nació.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For he considers himself and goes away, and immediately forgets what kind of person he is.
output: Porque él se considera a sí mismo, y se va, y luego olvida qué clase de persona es.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But he who looks into the perfect law, the law of freedom, and continues in it, becoming not a forgetful hearer but a doer of the work, this one will be blessed in his doing.
output: Mas el que mira atentamente en la perfecta ley, la de la libertad, y persevera en ella, no siendo oidor olvidadizo, sino hacedor de la obra, éste será bienaventurado en lo que hace.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: If anyone thinks himself to be religious and yet does not bridle his tongue but deceives his heart, this one’s religion is vain.
output: Si alguno se cree religioso, y no refrena su lengua, sino que engaña su corazón, la religión del tal es vana.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: This is pure and undefiled religion before our God and Father: to visit orphans and widows in their affliction and to keep oneself unspotted from the world.
output: La religión pura e incontaminada delante de nuestro Dios y Padre es ésta: visitar a los huérfanos y a las viudas en sus tribulaciones, y guardarse sin mancha del mundo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
output: En el principio era la Palabra, y la Palabra estaba con Dios, y la Palabra era Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He was in the beginning with God.
output: Aquel que es la Palabra estaba en el principio con Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: All things came into being through Him, and apart from Him not one thing came into being which has come into being.
output: Todas las cosas por medio de Él llegaron a existir, y sin Él nada de cuanto existe ha llegado a la existencia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In Him was life, and the life was the light of men.
output: En Él estaba la vida, y la vida era la luz de los hombres.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the light shines in the darkness, and the darkness did not overcome it.
output: La luz en las tinieblas resplandece, y las tinieblas no prevalecieron contra ella.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: There came a man sent from God, whose name was John.
output: Hubo un hombre enviado de Dios, el cual se llamaba Juan.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He came for a testimony that he might testify concerning the light, that all might believe through him.
output: Éste vino por testimonio, para que diese testimonio de la luz, a fin de que todos creyesen por él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He was not the light, but came that he might testify concerning the light.
output: No era él la luz, pero vino para dar testimonio de la luz.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: This was the true light which, coming into the world, enlightens every man.
output: Aquél era la luz verdadera que, con Su venida al mundo, ilumina a todo hombre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He was in the world, and the world came into being through Him, yet the world did not know Him.
output: En el mundo estaba, y por medio de Él llegó a existir el mundo; pero el mundo no le conoció.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He came to His own, yet those who were His own did not receive Him.
output: A lo Suyo vino, y los Suyos no le recibieron.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But as many as received Him, to them He gave the authority to become children of God, to those who believe into His name,
output: Mas a todos los que le recibieron, a los que creen en Su nombre, les dio autoridad de ser hechos hijos de Dios;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who were begotten not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of God.
output: los cuales no son engendrados de sangre, ni de voluntad de carne, ni de voluntad de varón, sino de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the Word became flesh and tabernacled among us (and we beheld His glory, glory as of the only Begotten from the Father), full of grace and reality.
output: Y la Palabra se hizo carne, y fijó tabernáculo entre nosotros (y contemplamos Su gloria, gloria como del Unigénito del Padre), llena de gracia y de realidad.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: John testified concerning Him and cried out, saying, This was He of whom I said, He who is coming after me has become ahead of me, because He was before me.
output: Juan dio testimonio de Él, y clamó diciendo: Éste es de quien yo decía: El que viene después de mí, se ha puesto delante de mí; porque era primero que yo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For of His fullness we have all received, and grace upon grace.
output: Porque de Su plenitud recibimos todos, y gracia sobre gracia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For the law was given through Moses; grace and reality came through Jesus Christ.
output: Pues la ley por medio de Moisés fue dada, pero la gracia y la realidad vinieron por medio de Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: No one has ever seen God; the only begotten Son, who is in the bosom of the Father, He has declared Him.
output: A Dios nadie le vio jamás; el unigénito Hijo, que está en el seno del Padre, Él le ha dado a conocer.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And this is the testimony of John, when the Jews sent to him priests and Levites from Jerusalem to ask him, Who are you?
output: Éste es el testimonio de Juan, cuando los judíos enviaron de Jerusalén sacerdotes y levitas para que le preguntasen: ¿Tú, quién eres?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And he confessed and did not deny, and he confessed, I am not the Christ.
output: Confesó, y no negó, sino confesó: Yo no soy el Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they asked him, What then? Are you Elijah? And he said, I am not. Are you the Prophet? And he answered, No.
output: Y le preguntaron: ¿Qué pues? ¿Eres tú Elías? Dijo: No soy. ¿Eres tú el Profeta? Y respondió: No.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: They said then to him, Who are you, that we may give an answer to those who sent us? What do you say about yourself?
output: Entonces le dijeron: ¿Quién eres?, para que demos respuesta a los que nos enviaron. ¿Qué dices de ti mismo?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He said, I am “a voice of one crying in the wilderness, Make straight the way of the Lord!” as Isaiah the prophet said.
output: Dijo: Yo soy la “voz de uno que clama en el desierto: ¡Enderezad el camino del Señor!”, como dijo el profeta Isaías.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And those who had been sent were of the Pharisees.
output: Y los que habían sido enviados eran de los fariseos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they asked him and said to him, Why then are you baptizing if you are not the Christ nor Elijah nor the Prophet?
output: Y le preguntaron, y le dijeron: ¿Por qué, pues, bautizas, si tú no eres el Cristo, ni Elías, ni el Profeta?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: John answered them, saying, I baptize in water; but among you stands One whom you do not know,
output: Juan les respondió diciendo: Yo bautizo en agua; mas en medio de vosotros está uno a quien vosotros no conocéis.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He who is coming after me, the thong of whose sandal I am not worthy to untie.
output: Éste es el que viene después de mí, a quien yo no soy digno de desatar la correa de Sus sandalias.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These things took place in Bethany across the Jordan, where John was baptizing.
output: Estas cosas sucedieron en Betania, al otro lado del Jordán, donde Juan estaba bautizando.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The next day he saw Jesus coming to him and said, Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world!
output: El siguiente día vio Juan a Jesús que venía a él, y dijo: ¡He aquí el Cordero de Dios, que quita el pecado del mundo!

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: This is He of whom I said, A man is coming after me who has become ahead of me, because He was before me.
output: Éste es Aquel de quien yo dije: Después de mí viene un varón, el cual se ha puesto delante de mí; porque era primero que yo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And I did not know Him, but in order that He might be manifested to Israel, for this reason I came baptizing in water.
output: Y yo no le conocía; mas para que fuese manifestado a Israel, por esto vine yo bautizando en agua.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And John testified, saying, I beheld the Spirit descending as a dove out of heaven, and He abode upon Him.
output: También dio Juan testimonio, diciendo: Vi al Espíritu que descendía del cielo como paloma, y permaneció sobre Él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And I did not know Him, but He who sent me to baptize in water, He said to me, He upon whom you see the Spirit descending and abiding upon Him, this is He who baptizes in the Holy Spirit.
output: Y yo no le conocía; pero el que me envió a bautizar en agua, Él me dijo: Sobre quien veas descender al Espíritu y que permanece sobre Él, ése es el que bautiza en el Espíritu Santo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And I have seen and have testified that this is the Son of God.
output: Y yo le vi, y he dado testimonio de que éste es el Hijo de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Again the next day John was standing with two of his disciples,
output: El siguiente día otra vez estaba Juan, y dos de sus discípulos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And looking at Jesus walking, he said, Behold, the Lamb of God!
output: Y mirando a Jesús que andaba por allí, dijo: ¡He aquí el Cordero de Dios!

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the two disciples heard him speak this, and they followed Jesus.
output: Le oyeron hablar los dos discípulos, y siguieron a Jesús.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Jesus, turning and beholding them following, said to them, What are you seeking? And they said to Him, Rabbi (which translated means Teacher), where are You staying?
output: Y volviéndose Jesús, y viendo que le seguían, les dijo: ¿Qué buscáis? Ellos le dijeron: Rabí (que traducido es, Maestro), ¿dónde moras?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He said to them, Come, and you will see. They went therefore and saw where He was staying, and they stayed with Him that day; it was about the tenth hour.
output: Les dijo: Venid y ved. Fueron, y vieron donde moraba, y se quedaron con Él aquel día; era como la hora décima.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: One of the two who heard this from John and followed Him was Andrew, Simon Peter’s brother.
output: Andrés, hermano de Simón Pedro, era uno de los dos que habían oído lo que había dicho Juan, y habían seguido a Jesús.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He first found his own brother Simon and said to him, We have found the Messiah (which translated means Christ).
output: Él halló primero a su hermano Simón, y le dijo: Hemos hallado al Mesías (que traducido es, el Cristo).

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He led him to Jesus. Looking at him, Jesus said, You are Simon, the son of John; you shall be called Cephas (which is interpreted, Peter).
output: Y le trajo a Jesús. Y mirándole Jesús, dijo: Tú eres Simón, hijo de Jonás; tú serás llamado Cefas (que quiere decir, Pedro).

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The next day He wanted to go forth into Galilee, and He found Philip. And Jesus said to him, Follow Me.
output: El siguiente día quiso Jesús ir a Galilea, y halló a Felipe, y le dijo: Sígueme.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Now Philip was from Bethsaida, of the city of Andrew and Peter.
output: Y Felipe era de Betsaida, la ciudad de Andrés y Pedro.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Philip found Nathanael and said to him, We have found Him of whom Moses in the law, and the prophets, wrote, Jesus, the son of Joseph, from Nazareth.
output: Felipe halló a Natanael, y le dijo: Hemos hallado a Aquel de quien escribió Moisés en la ley, así como los profetas: a Jesús, el hijo de José, de Nazaret.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Nathanael said to him, Can anything good be from Nazareth? Philip said to him, Come and see.
output: Natanael le dijo: ¿De Nazaret puede salir algo bueno? Le dijo Felipe: Ven y ve.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Jesus saw Nathanael coming to Him and said concerning him, Behold, truly an Israelite, in whom there is no guile!
output: Cuando Jesús vio a Natanael que se le acercaba, dijo de él: ¡He aquí un verdadero israelita, en quien no hay engaño!

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Nathanael said to Him, How do You know me? Jesus answered and said to him, Before Philip called you, while you were under the fig tree, I saw you.
output: Le dijo Natanael: ¿Cómo es que me conoces? Respondió Jesús y le dijo: Antes que Felipe te llamara, cuando estabas debajo de la higuera, te vi.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Nathanael answered Him, Rabbi, You are the Son of God; You are the King of Israel.
output: Respondió Natanael y le dijo: Rabí, Tú eres el Hijo de Dios; Tú eres el Rey de Israel.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Jesus answered and said to him, Is it because I told you that I saw you under the fig tree that you believe? You shall see greater things than these.
output: Respondió Jesús y le dijo: ¿Porque te dije: Te vi debajo de la higuera, crees? Cosas mayores que éstas verás.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He said to him, Truly, truly, I say to you, You shall see heaven opened and the angels of God ascending and descending on the Son of Man.
output: Y le dijo: De cierto, de cierto os digo: Veréis el cielo abierto, y a los ángeles de Dios subir y descender sobre el Hijo del Hombre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Jude, a slave of Jesus Christ and a brother of James, to those who are called, beloved in God the Father, and kept by Jesus Christ:
output: Judas, esclavo de Jesucristo, y hermano de Jacobo, a los llamados, amados en Dios Padre, y guardados por Jesucristo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Mercy to you and peace and love be multiplied.
output: Misericordia a vosotros y paz y amor os sean multiplicados.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Beloved, while using all diligence to write to you concerning our common salvation, I found it necessary to write to you and exhort you to earnestly contend for the faith once for all delivered to the saints.
output: Amados, poniendo toda diligencia en escribiros acerca de nuestra común salvación, me ha sido necesario escribiros exhortándoos a que contendáis ardientemente por la fe que ha sido transmitida a los santos una vez para siempre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For certain men have crept in unnoticed, who of old have been written of beforehand for this judgment, ungodly men, perverting the grace of our God into licentiousness and denying our only Master and Lord, Jesus Christ.
output: Porque algunos hombres se han introducido encubiertamente, los que ya desde antiguo estaban inscritos para este juicio, hombres impíos, que convierten en libertinaje la gracia de nuestro Dios, y niegan a nuestro único Amo y Señor Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But I intend to remind you, though you know all things once for all, that the Lord, having saved a people out of the land of Egypt, afterward destroyed those who did not believe;
output: Mas quiero recordaros, aunque lo habéis aprendido todo de una vez para siempre, que el Señor, habiendo salvado al pueblo sacándolo de la tierra de Egipto, después destruyó a los que no creyeron.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And angels who did not keep their own principality but abandoned their own dwelling place, He has kept in eternal bonds under gloom for the judgment of the great day;
output: Y a los ángeles que no guardaron su principado, sino que abandonaron su propia morada, los ha guardado bajo oscuridad, en prisiones eternas, para el juicio del gran día;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: How Sodom and Gomorrah and the cities around them, who in like manner with these gave themselves over to fornication and went after different flesh, are set forth as an example, undergoing the penalty of eternal fire.
output: como Sodoma y Gomorra y las ciudades vecinas, las cuales de la misma manera que aquéllos, se dedicaron a la fornicación y fueron en pos de una carne diferente, fueron puestas por ejemplo, sufriendo el castigo del fuego eterno.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Nevertheless in like manner these dreamers also defile the flesh and despise lordship and revile dignities.
output: No obstante, de la misma manera también estos soñadores contaminan la carne, menosprecian el señorío e injurian a las potestades superiores.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But Michael the archangel, when he contended with the devil and disputed concerning the body of Moses, did not dare to bring a reviling judgment against him but said, The Lord rebuke you.
output: Pero cuando el arcángel Miguel contendía con el diablo, disputando con él por el cuerpo de Moisés, no se atrevió a proferir juicio de maldición contra él, sino que dijo: El Señor te reprenda.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But these revile the things that they do not know; and the things that they understand naturally, like animals without reason, in these they are being corrupted.
output: Pero éstos maldicen lo que no conocen; y en lo que por naturaleza entienden, se corrompen como animales irracionales.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Woe to them! For they have gone in the way of Cain and have rushed out in the error of Balaam for reward and have perished in the rebellion of Korah.
output: ¡Ay de ellos! porque han seguido el camino de Caín, y se lanzaron por lucro en el error de Balaam, y perecieron en la rebelión de Coré.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These are the hidden reefs in your love feasts, feasting together with you without fear, shepherding themselves; waterless clouds being carried off by winds; autumn trees without fruit, having died twice, rooted up;
output: Éstos son escollos ocultos en vuestros ágapes, que comiendo con vosotros sin temor se apacientan a sí mismos; nubes sin agua, arrastradas por los vientos; árboles otoñales, sin fruto, dos veces muertos y desarraigados;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Wild waves of the sea, foaming out their own shames; wandering stars, for whom the gloom of darkness is kept for eternity.
output: fieras ondas del mar, que espuman su propia vergüenza; estrellas errantes, para las cuales está reservada eternamente la oscuridad de las tinieblas.
