instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Enoch, the seventh from Adam, prophesied also of these, saying, Behold, the Lord came with myriads of His saints
output: De éstos también profetizó Enoc, séptimo desde Adán, diciendo: He aquí, vino el Señor con millares de Sus santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To execute judgment against all and to convict all the ungodly concerning all their ungodly works which they have done in ungodliness, and concerning all the hard things which ungodly sinners have spoken against Him.
output: para hacer juicio contra todos, y dejar convictos a todos los impíos de todas sus obras impías que han hecho impíamente, y de todas las cosas duras que los pecadores impíos han hablado contra Él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These are murmurers, complainers, going on according to their own lusts; and their mouth speaks great swelling things, flattering persons for the sake of advantage.
output: Éstos son murmuradores, quejumbrosos, que andan según sus propias concupiscencias, cuya boca habla cosas infladas, adulando a las personas para sacar provecho.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But you, beloved, remember the words spoken before by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ,
output: Pero vosotros, amados, tened memoria de las palabras que antes fueron dichas por los apóstoles de nuestro Señor Jesucristo;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That they said to you, In the last time there will be mockers, going on according to their own lusts for ungodliness.
output: los que os decían: En el postrer tiempo habrá burlones, que andarán según sus impías concupiscencias.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These are those who make divisions, soulish, having no spirit.
output: Éstos son los que causan divisiones, los anímicos, que no tienen espíritu.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But you, beloved, building up yourselves upon your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit,
output: Pero vosotros, amados, edificándoos sobre vuestra santísima fe, orando en el Espíritu Santo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Keep yourselves in the love of God, awaiting the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ unto eternal life.
output: conservaos en el amor de Dios, esperando la misericordia de nuestro Señor Jesucristo para vida eterna.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And on some have mercy, on those who are wavering;
output: De algunos que vacilan, tened misericordia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Save them by snatching them out of the fire. On others have mercy in fear, hating even the inner garment spotted from the flesh.
output: y salvadlos, arrebatándolos del fuego; y de otros tened misericordia con temor, aborreciendo aun la ropa manchada por su carne.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But to Him who is able to guard you from stumbling and to set you before His glory without blemish in exultation,
output: Y a Aquel que es poderoso para guardaros de tropiezos, y presentaros sin mancha delante de Su gloria con gran alegría,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To the only God our Savior through Jesus Christ our Lord be glory, majesty, might, and authority before all time and now and unto all eternity. Amen.
output: al único Dios, nuestro Salvador, por medio de nuestro Señor Jesucristo, sea gloria y majestad, imperio y autoridad, desde antes de todos los tiempos, ahora y por todos los siglos. Amén.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Inasmuch as many have undertaken to draw up a narrative concerning the matters which have been fully accomplished among us,
output: Ya que muchos han emprendido el trabajo de componer un relato de las cosas que se han cumplido cabalmente entre nosotros,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as those who from the beginning became eyewitnesses and ministers of the word have delivered them to us,
output: tal como nos las transmitieron los que desde el principio fueron testigos oculares y ministros de la palabra,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: It seemed good to me also, having carefully investigated all things from the first, to write them out for you in an orderly fashion, most excellent Theophilus,
output: me ha parecido también a mí, después de haber investigado con diligencia todas las cosas desde su origen, escribírtelas ordenadamente, excelentísimo Teófilo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So that you may fully know the certainty of the things concerning which you were instructed.
output: para que conozcas bien la certeza de las cosas en las cuales has sido instruido.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In the days of Herod, king of Judea, there was a certain priest named Zachariah, of the course of Abijah; and his wife was of the daughters of Aaron, and her name was Elizabeth.
output: Hubo en los días de Herodes, rey de Judea, un sacerdote llamado Zacarías, del turno de Abías; su mujer era de las hijas de Aarón, y se llamaba Elisabet.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they were both righteous before God, walking in all the commandments and ordinances of the Lord, blameless.
output: Ambos eran justos delante de Dios, pues andaban irreprensibles en todos los mandamientos y ordenanzas del Señor.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they had no child, because Elizabeth was barren, and they were both advanced in their days.
output: Y no tenían hijo, porque Elisabet era estéril, y ambos eran de edad avanzada.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And while he served as priest in the order of his course before God,
output: Aconteció que ejerciendo Zacarías el sacerdocio delante de Dios según el orden de su turno,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: According to the custom of the priestly service, the lot fell to him to enter into the temple of the Lord and burn incense.
output: conforme a la costumbre del sacerdocio, le tocó en suerte entrar en el templo del Señor a quemar incienso.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And all the multitude of the people were praying outside at the hour of the burning of incense.
output: Y toda la multitud del pueblo estaba fuera orando a la hora de quemar el incienso.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And an angel of the Lord appeared to him, standing at the right side of the altar of incense.
output: Y se le apareció un ángel del Señor puesto en pie a la derecha del altar del incienso.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Zachariah was troubled when he saw him, and fear fell upon him.
output: Y se turbó Zacarías al verle, y le sobrecogió temor.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But the angel said to him, Do not be afraid, Zachariah, because your petition has been heard, and your wife Elizabeth will bear you a son, and you shall call his name John.
output: Pero el ángel le dijo: Zacarías, no temas, porque tu petición ha sido oída, y tu mujer Elisabet te dará a luz un hijo, y llamarás su nombre Juan.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And you will have joy and exultation, and many will rejoice at his birth.
output: Y tendrás gozo y júbilo, y muchos se regocijarán de su nacimiento;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For he will be great in the sight of the Lord, and he shall by no means drink wine and liquor. And he will be filled with the Holy Spirit, even from his mother’s womb,
output: porque será grande ante el Señor. No beberá jamás ni vino ni licor, y será lleno del Espíritu Santo, aun desde el vientre de su madre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And many of the sons of Israel he will turn to the Lord their God.
output: Y hará que muchos de los hijos de Israel se vuelvan al Señor Dios de ellos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And it is he who will go before Him in the spirit and power of Elijah to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children, and the disobedient to the prudence of the righteous, to prepare for the Lord a people made ready.
output: E irá delante de Él en el espíritu y el poder de Elías, para hacer volver los corazones de los padres a los hijos, y los desobedientes a la prudencia de los justos, para preparar al Señor un pueblo bien dispuesto.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Zachariah said to the angel, By what shall I know this? For I am an old man and my wife is advanced in years.
output: Dijo Zacarías al ángel: ¿En qué conoceré esto? Porque yo soy viejo, y mi mujer es de edad avanzada.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the angel answered and said to him, I am Gabriel, who stands before God, and I was sent to speak to you and to announce the good news of these things to you.
output: Respondiendo el ángel, le dijo: Yo soy Gabriel, que estoy delante de Dios; y he sido enviado a hablarte, y a anunciarte las buenas nuevas de estas cosas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And behold, you shall be silent and not able to speak until the day that these things happen, because you did not believe my words, which will be fulfilled in their time.
output: He aquí, te quedarás mudo y no podrás hablar, hasta el día en que sucedan estas cosas, por cuanto no creíste mis palabras, las cuales se cumplirán a su tiempo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the people were waiting for Zachariah, and they marveled at his delaying in the temple.
output: Y el pueblo estaba esperando a Zacarías, y se extrañaba de que él se demorase en el templo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when he came out, he was not able to speak to them, and they realized that he had seen a vision in the temple. And he made signs to them and remained dumb.
output: Pero cuando salió, no les podía hablar; y comprendieron que había visto visión en el templo. Él les hacía señas, y permaneció mudo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when the days of his service were fulfilled, he went to his house.
output: Y cumplidos los días de su servicio sacerdotal, se fue a su casa.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And after these days Elizabeth his wife conceived and stayed in seclusion for five months, saying,
output: Después de aquellos días concibió su mujer Elisabet, y se recluyó en casa por cinco meses, diciendo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In this way has the Lord dealt with me in the days in which He looked upon me to take away my reproach among men.
output: Así ha hecho conmigo el Señor en los días en que me miró para quitar mi oprobio entre los hombres.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And in the sixth month the angel Gabriel was sent from God to a city of Galilee named Nazareth,
output: Al sexto mes el ángel Gabriel fue enviado de parte de Dios a una ciudad de Galilea, llamada Nazaret,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To a virgin engaged to a man named Joseph, of the house of David; and the virgin’s name was Mary.
output: a una virgen desposada con un varón que se llamaba José, de la casa de David; y el nombre de la virgen era María.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And he came to her and said, Rejoice, you who have been graced! The Lord is with you.
output: Y entrando el ángel en donde ella estaba, dijo: ¡Regocíjate, pues se te ha concedido gracia! El Señor está contigo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And she was greatly troubled at this saying and began reasoning what kind of greeting this might be.
output: A estas palabras ella se turbó profundamente, y pensaba qué salutación sería ésta.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the angel said to her, Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found grace with God.
output: Entonces el ángel le dijo: María, no temas, porque has hallado gracia delante de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall call His name Jesus.
output: Y he aquí, concebirás en tu vientre, y darás a luz un hijo, y llamarás Su nombre Jesús.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He will be great and will be called Son of the Most High; and the Lord God will give to Him the throne of David His father,
output: Éste será grande, y será llamado Hijo del Altísimo; y el Señor Dios le dará el trono de David Su padre;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He will reign over the house of Jacob forever, and of His kingdom there will be no end.
output: y reinará sobre la casa de Jacob para siempre, y Su reino no tendrá fin.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But Mary said to the angel, How will this be, since I have not known a man?
output: Pero María dijo al ángel: ¿Cómo será esto? pues no conozco varón.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the angel answered and said to her, The Holy Spirit will come upon you, and the power of the Most High will overshadow you; therefore also the holy thing which is born will be called the Son of God.
output: Respondiendo el ángel, le dijo: El Espíritu Santo vendrá sobre ti, y el poder del Altísimo te cubrirá con su sombra; por eso también lo santo que nacerá, será llamado Hijo de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And behold, Elizabeth your relative, she also has conceived a son in her old age, and this is the sixth month for her who is called barren,
output: Y he aquí tu parienta Elisabet, ella también ha concebido hijo en su vejez; y éste es el sexto mes para ella, la que llamaban estéril;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because no word will be impossible with God.
output: porque ninguna palabra será imposible para Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Mary said, Behold, the slave of the Lord. May it happen to me according to your word. And the angel departed from her.
output: Y María dijo: He aquí la esclava del Señor; hágase conmigo conforme a tu palabra. Y el ángel se fue de ella.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Mary rose up in those days and went to the hill country with haste, to a city of Judah,
output: En aquellos días, levantándose María, fue de prisa a la región montañosa, a una ciudad de Judá;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And entered into the house of Zachariah and greeted Elizabeth.
output: y entró en casa de Zacarías, y saludó a Elisabet.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when Elizabeth heard Mary’s greeting, the baby leaped in her womb, and Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit.
output: Y aconteció que cuando oyó Elisabet la salutación de María, la criatura saltó en su vientre; y Elisabet fue llena del Espíritu Santo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And she lifted up her voice with a loud cry and said, Blessed are you among women, and blessed is the fruit of your womb!
output: y alzó la voz en una gran exclamación, y dijo: ¡Bendita tú entre las mujeres, y bendito el fruto de tu vientre!

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And how has this happened to me, that the mother of my Lord should come to me?
output: ¿Por qué se me concede esto a mí, que la madre de mi Señor venga a mí?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For behold, when the sound of your greeting came to my ears, the baby leaped with exultation in my womb.
output: Porque, he aquí, cuando llegó la voz de tu salutación a mis oídos, la criatura dio saltos de júbilo en mi vientre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And blessed is she who has believed, because there will be a completion of the things spoken to her from the Lord.
output: Y bienaventurada la que creyó, porque tendrá cumplimiento lo que le fue dicho de parte del Señor.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Mary said, My soul magnifies the Lord,
output: Entonces María dijo: Mi alma magnifica al Señor;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And my spirit has exulted in God my Savior;
output: y mi espíritu ha exultado en Dios mi Salvador.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because He has looked upon the low estate of His slave. For behold, from now on all generations will count me blessed,
output: Porque ha mirado la bajeza de Su esclava; pues he aquí, desde ahora me tendrán por bienaventurada todas las generaciones.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because the Mighty One has done great things for me, and holy is His name.
output: Porque me ha hecho grandes cosas el Poderoso; santo es Su nombre,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And His mercy is unto generations and generations, unto those who fear Him.
output: y Su misericordia es de generación en generación a los que le temen.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He has exercised might with His arm; He has scattered those who are proud in the understanding of their heart.
output: Hizo proezas con Su brazo; esparció a los soberbios en el pensamiento de sus corazones.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He has brought down potentates from thrones and has exalted the humble;
output: Quitó de los tronos a los poderosos, y exaltó a los humildes.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The hungry He has filled with good things, and the rich He has sent away empty.
output: A los hambrientos colmó de bienes, y a los ricos despidió vacíos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He has upheld Israel His servant to remember mercy,
output: Socorrió a Israel Su siervo, acordándose de la misericordia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as He spoke to our fathers, to Abraham and to his seed forever.
output: tal como habló a nuestros padres, para con Abraham y su descendencia para siempre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Mary remained with her about three months, and returned to her home.
output: Y se quedó María con ella como tres meses; después se volvió a su casa.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Now the time was fulfilled for Elizabeth to give birth, and she bore a son.
output: A Elisabet se le cumplió el tiempo de su alumbramiento y dio a luz un hijo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And her neighbors and relatives heard that the Lord had magnified His mercy with her, and they rejoiced with her.
output: Y oyeron sus vecinos y parientes que el Señor había engrandecido para con ella Su misericordia y se regocijaron con ella.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And on the eighth day they came to circumcise the little child, and they tried to call him after the name of his father, Zachariah.
output: Aconteció que al octavo día vinieron para circuncidar al niño; y querían llamarle con el nombre de su padre, Zacarías;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Yet his mother answered and said, No, but he shall be called John.
output: pero respondiendo su madre, dijo: No, sino que se llamará Juan.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they said to her, There is no one among your relatives who is called by this name.
output: Le dijeron: No hay nadie en tu parentela que se llame con ese nombre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they gestured to his father as to what he would want him to be called.
output: Entonces preguntaron por señas a su padre, cómo quería que se llamase.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And asking for a tablet, he wrote, saying, John is his name. And they all marveled.
output: Y pidiendo una tablilla, escribió, diciendo: Juan es su nombre. Y todos se maravillaron.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And his mouth was opened instantly, and his tongue loosed, and he began to speak, blessing God.
output: Al momento fue abierta su boca y suelta su lengua, y comenzó a hablar bendiciendo a Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And fear came on all those dwelling around them, and in all the hill country of Judea all these things were spread about.
output: Y vino temor sobre todos los que vivían alrededor de ellos; y en toda la región montañosa de Judea se divulgaron todas estas cosas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And all who heard these things put them in their heart, saying, What then will this little child be? For indeed the hand of the Lord was with him.
output: Y todos los que las oían las guardaban en su corazón, diciendo: ¿Qué, pues, llegará a ser este niño? Pues, a la verdad, la mano del Señor estaba con él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Zachariah his father was filled with the Holy Spirit and prophesied, saying,
output: Y Zacarías su padre fue lleno del Espíritu Santo, y profetizó, diciendo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, because He has visited and accomplished redemption for His people,
output: Bendito el Señor Dios de Israel, porque ha visitado a Su pueblo y ha efectuado su redención,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And raised a horn of salvation for us in the house of David His servant,
output: y nos levantó un cuerno de salvación en la casa de David Su siervo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as He spoke through the mouth of His holy prophets from of old —
output: tal como habló por boca de Sus santos profetas desde antiguo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Salvation from our enemies and from the hand of all who hate us,
output: salvación de nuestros enemigos y de la mano de todos los que nos aborrecen,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To accomplish mercy with our fathers and to remember His holy covenant,
output: para hacer misericordia con nuestros padres y acordarse de Su santo pacto,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The oath which He swore to Abraham our father,
output: el juramento que hizo a Abraham nuestro padre,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To grant us that we, having been delivered out of the hand of our enemies, might serve Him without fear,
output: que nos había de conceder que, librados de la mano de nuestros enemigos, sin temor le serviríamos

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In holiness and righteousness before Him all our days.
output: en santidad y en justicia delante de Él, todos nuestros días.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And you also, little child, shall be called a prophet of the Most High, for you will go before the Lord to prepare His ways,
output: Y tú, niño, profeta del Altísimo serás llamado; porque irás delante del Señor para preparar Sus caminos;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To give knowledge of salvation to His people by the forgiveness of their sins,
output: para dar conocimiento de salvación a Su pueblo, por el perdón de sus pecados,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because of the merciful compassions of our God, in which the rising sun will visit us from on high,
output: por la entrañable misericordia de nuestro Dios, en virtud de la cual nos ha de visitar desde lo alto el sol naciente,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To shine upon those sitting in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace.
output: para dar luz a los asentados en tinieblas y en sombra de muerte; para encaminar nuestros pies por camino de paz.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the little child grew and became strong in spirit, and he was in the wilderness until the day of his presentation to Israel.
output: Y el niño crecía, y se fortalecía en espíritu; y estuvo en el desierto hasta el día de su presentación a Israel.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The beginning of the gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God,
output: Principio del evangelio de Jesucristo, Hijo de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as it is written in Isaiah the prophet: “Behold, I send My messenger before Your face, who will prepare Your way,
output: Como está escrito en Isaías el profeta: “He aquí Yo envío Mi mensajero delante de Tu faz, el cual preparará Tu camino.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: A voice of one crying in the wilderness: Prepare the way of the Lord; make straight His paths.”
output: Voz de uno que clama en el desierto: Preparad el camino del Señor; enderezad Sus sendas”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: John came baptizing in the wilderness and preaching a baptism of repentance for forgiveness of sins.
output: Apareció Juan en el desierto bautizando y predicando el bautismo de arrepentimiento para perdón de pecados.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And all the region of Judea went out to him, and all the people of Jerusalem; and they were baptized by him in the Jordan River, as they confessed their sins.
output: Y salían a él toda la región de Judea, y todos los de Jerusalén; y eran bautizados por él en el río Jordán, confesando sus pecados.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And John was clothed in camel’s hair and had a leather girdle around his loins, and he ate locusts and wild honey.
output: Y Juan estaba vestido de pelo de camello, y tenía un cinto de cuero alrededor de sus lomos; y comía langostas y miel silvestre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And he preached, saying, He who is stronger than I comes after me, the thong of whose sandals I am not worthy to stoop down and untie.
output: Y predicaba, diciendo: Viene tras mí el que es más fuerte que yo, a quien no soy digno de desatar, agachado, la correa de Sus sandalias.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I have baptized you in water, but He Himself will baptize you in the Holy Spirit.
output: Yo os he bautizado en agua; pero Él os bautizará en el Espíritu Santo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And in those days Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee and was baptized in the Jordan by John.
output: Aconteció en aquellos días, que Jesús vino de Nazaret de Galilea, y fue bautizado por Juan en el Jordán.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately, coming up out of the water, He saw the heavens being parted and the Spirit as a dove descending upon Him.
output: E inmediatamente, cuando subía del agua, vio abrirse los cielos y al Espíritu descender como paloma sobre Él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And a voice came out of the heavens: You are My Son, the Beloved; in You I have found My delight.
output: Y vino una voz de los cielos que decía: Tú eres Mi Hijo, el Amado; en Ti me complazco.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately the Spirit thrust Him out into the wilderness.
output: En seguida el Espíritu le impulsó al desierto.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He was in the wilderness forty days, being tempted by Satan; and He was with the wild animals, and the angels ministered to Him.
output: Y estuvo en el desierto cuarenta días, siendo tentado por Satanás; y estaba con las fieras, y los ángeles le ministraban.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And after John was delivered up, Jesus came into Galilee, proclaiming the gospel of God,
output: Después que Juan fue entregado, Jesús vino a Galilea proclamando el evangelio de Dios,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And saying, The time is fulfilled and the kingdom of God has drawn near. Repent and believe in the gospel.
output: y diciendo: El tiempo se ha cumplido, y el reino de Dios se ha acercado; arrepentíos, y creed en el evangelio.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And passing beside the Sea of Galilee, He saw Simon and Andrew, Simon’s brother, casting a net in the sea, for they were fishermen.
output: Pasando junto al mar de Galilea, vio a Simón y a Andrés, hermano de Simón, echando la red en el mar; porque eran pescadores.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Jesus said to them, Come after Me, and I will cause you to become fishers of men.
output: Y les dijo Jesús: Venid en pos de Mí, y haré que seáis pescadores de hombres.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately leaving the nets, they followed Him.
output: Y dejando al instante las redes, le siguieron.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And going on a little, He saw James the son of Zebedee and John his brother, who also were in their boat, mending the nets.
output: Al ir un poco más adelante, vio a Jacobo hijo de Zebedeo, y a Juan su hermano, los cuales también estaban en la barca, remendando las redes.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately He called them, and leaving their father Zebedee in the boat with the hired servants, they went after Him.
output: Y al instante los llamó; y dejando a su padre Zebedeo en la barca con los jornaleros, se fueron en pos de Él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they went into Capernaum, and immediately, on the Sabbath, He entered into the synagogue and taught.
output: Y entraron en Capernaum; e inmediatamente, el Sábado, entró en la sinagoga y se puso a enseñar.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they were astounded at His teaching, for He taught them as One having authority and not like the scribes.
output: Y se admiraban de Su enseñanza; porque les enseñaba como quien tiene autoridad, y no como los escribas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately, there was in their synagogue a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out, saying,
output: Y de repente, en la sinagoga de ellos, un hombre con espíritu inmundo gritó, diciendo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: What have we to do with You, Jesus, Nazarene? Have You come to destroy us? I know who You are — the Holy One of God.
output: ¿Qué tenemos que ver contigo, Jesús nazareno? ¿Has venido para destruirnos? Sé quién eres, el Santo de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Jesus rebuked him, saying, Be quiet and come out of him!
output: Pero Jesús le reprendió, diciendo: ¡Cállate, y sal de él!

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the unclean spirit, convulsing him and shouting with a loud voice, came out of him.
output: Y el espíritu inmundo, sacudiéndole con violencia, y clamando a gran voz, salió de él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they were all amazed, so that they discussed among themselves, saying, What is this? A new teaching! With authority He orders even the unclean spirits, and they obey Him.
output: Y todos se asombraron, de tal manera que discutían entre sí, diciendo: ¿Qué es esto? ¡Una enseñanza nueva! Él manda con autoridad a los espíritus inmundos, y le obedecen.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately the report concerning Him went out everywhere into all the surrounding region of Galilee.
output: Y muy pronto se difundió Su fama por todas partes en la región alrededor de Galilea.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately, going out of the synagogue, they came into the house of Simon and Andrew with James and John.
output: Inmediatamente después de salir de la sinagoga, entraron en la casa de Simón y Andrés, con Jacobo y Juan.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Simon’s mother-in-law was lying down with a fever, and immediately they told Him about her.
output: Y la suegra de Simón estaba acostada, con fiebre; y en seguida le hablaron de ella.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He came to her and raised her up, holding her hand, and the fever left her, and she served them.
output: Entonces Él se acercó, y la levantó, tomándola de la mano; y la fiebre la dejó, y ella se puso a servirles.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when evening fell and the sun had set, they brought to Him all those who were ill and those who were demon-possessed.
output: Al atardecer, puesto ya el sol, le trajeron todos los enfermos y los endemoniados;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the whole city was gathered together at the door.
output: y toda la ciudad estaba agolpada a la puerta.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He healed many who were ill with various diseases, and He cast out many demons and did not allow the demons to speak, because they knew Him.
output: Y sanó a muchos que padecían diversas enfermedades, y echó fuera muchos demonios; y no permitía a los demonios hablar, porque le conocían.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And rising very early in the morning, while it was still night, He went out and went away to a deserted place, and there He prayed.
output: Levantándose muy de mañana, siendo aún muy oscuro, salió y se fue a un lugar desierto, y allí oraba.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Simon and those with him hunted for Him,
output: Y Simón y los que estaban con él salieron en Su busca;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they found Him and said to Him, All are seeking You.
output: y hallándole, le dijeron: Todos te buscan.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He said to them, Let us go elsewhere into the nearby towns that I may preach there also, because for this purpose I came out.
output: Él les dijo: Vamos a otro lugar, a los pueblos vecinos, para que predique también allí; porque para esto he salido.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He went preaching in their synagogues in the whole of Galilee and casting out the demons.
output: E iba predicando en las sinagogas de ellos en toda Galilea y echando fuera los demonios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And a leper came to Him, entreating Him and falling on his knees and saying to Him, If You are willing, You can cleanse me.
output: Vino a Él un leproso, rogándole; y arrodillándose, le dijo: Si quieres, puedes limpiarme.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He was moved with compassion, and stretching out His hand, He touched him and said to him, I am willing; be cleansed!
output: Y Jesús, movido a compasión, extendió la mano y le tocó, y le dijo: Quiero, sé limpio.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And immediately the leprosy left him, and he was cleansed.
output: Y al instante la lepra se fue de aquél, y quedó limpio.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And sternly charging him, immediately He thrust him out,
output: Y encargándole rigurosamente, en seguida le despidió,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And said to him, See that you say nothing to anyone; but go, show yourself to the priest and offer for your cleansing the things which Moses commanded, for a testimony to them.
output: y le dijo: Mira que no digas nada a nadie, sino ve, muéstrate al sacerdote, y ofrece por tu purificación lo que Moisés ordenó, para testimonio a ellos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But he went out and began to proclaim it much and to spread the matter abroad, so that He could no longer enter openly into a city, but He stayed outside in deserted places. And they came to Him from everywhere.
output: Pero él salió y comenzó a proclamarlo mucho y a divulgar el hecho, de manera que Jesús ya no podía entrar abiertamente en ninguna ciudad, sino que se quedaba fuera en los lugares desiertos; y venían a Él de todas partes.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Abraham begot Isaac, and Isaac begot Jacob, and Jacob begot Judah and his brothers,
output: Abraham engendró a Isaac; e Isaac engendró a Jacob; y Jacob engendró a Judá y a sus hermanos;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Judah begot Pharez and Zarah of Tamar, and Pharez begot Hezron, and Hezron begot Aram,
output: y Judá engendró de Tamar a Fares y a Zara; y Fares engendró a Esrom; y Esrom engendró a Aram;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Aram begot Aminadab, and Aminadab begot Nahshon, and Nahshon begot Salmon,
output: y Aram engendró a Aminadab; y Aminadab engendró a Naasón; y Naasón engendró a Salmón;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Salmon begot Boaz of Rahab, and Boaz begot Obed of Ruth, and Obed begot Jesse,
output: y Salmón engendró de Rahab a Booz; y Booz engendró de Rut a Obed; y Obed engendró a Isaí;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Jesse begot David the king. And David begot Solomon of her who had been the wife of Uriah,
output: e Isaí engendró a David, el rey. Y David engendró a Salomón de la que había sido mujer de Urías;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Solomon begot Rehoboam, and Rehoboam begot Abijah, and Abijah begot Asa,
output: y Salomón engendró a Roboam; y Roboam engendró a Abías; y Abías engendró a Asa;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Asa begot Jehoshaphat, and Jehoshaphat begot Joram, and Joram begot Uzziah,
output: y Asa engendró a Josafat; y Josafat engendró a Joram; y Joram engendró a Uzías;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Uzziah begot Jotham, and Jotham begot Ahaz, and Ahaz begot Hezekiah,
output: y Uzías engendró a Jotam; y Jotam engendró a Acaz; y Acaz engendró a Ezequías;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Hezekiah begot Manasseh, and Manasseh begot Amon, and Amon begot Josiah.
output: y Ezequías engendró a Manasés; y Manasés engendró a Amón; y Amón engendró a Josías;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Josiah begot Jeconiah and his brothers at the time of the deportation to Babylon.
output: y Josías engendró a Jeconías y a sus hermanos en el tiempo de la deportación a Babilonia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And after the deportation to Babylon, Jeconiah begot Salathiel, and Salathiel begot Zerubbabel,
output: Y después de la deportación a Babilonia, Jeconías engendró a Salatiel; y Salatiel engendró a Zorobabel;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Zerubbabel begot Abiud, and Abiud begot Eliakim, and Eliakim begot Azor,
output: y Zorobabel engendró a Abiud; y Abiud engendró a Eliaquim; y Eliaquim engendró a Azor;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Azor begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Achim, and Achim begot Eliud,
output: y Azor engendró a Sadoc; y Sadoc engendró a Aquim; y Aquim engendró a Eliud;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Eliud begot Eleazar, and Eleazar begot Matthan, and Matthan begot Jacob,
output: y Eliud engendró a Eleazar; y Eleazar engendró a Matán; y Matán engendró a Jacob;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Jacob begot Joseph the husband of Mary, of whom was born Jesus, who is called Christ.
output: y Jacob engendró a José, marido de María, de la cual nació Jesús, quien es llamado el Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Thus all the generations from Abraham until David are fourteen generations, and from David until the deportation to Babylon, fourteen generations, and from the deportation to Babylon until the Christ, fourteen generations.
output: De manera que todas las generaciones desde Abraham hasta David son catorce generaciones; desde David hasta la deportación a Babilonia, catorce generaciones; y desde la deportación a Babilonia hasta el Cristo, catorce generaciones.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Now the origin of Jesus Christ was in this way: His mother, Mary, after she had been engaged to Joseph, before they came together, was found to be with child of the Holy Spirit.
output: El origen de Jesucristo fue así: Estando desposada María Su madre con José, antes que se juntasen, se halló que estaba encinta por obra del Espíritu Santo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And Joseph her husband, being righteous and not willing to disgrace her openly, intended to send her away secretly.
output: Y José su marido, como era justo y no quería exponerla a la vergüenza pública, quiso despedirla secretamente.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But while he pondered these things, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream, saying, Joseph, son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary your wife, for that which has been begotten in her is of the Holy Spirit.
output: Mientras consideraba esto, he aquí un ángel del Señor se le apareció en sueños y le dijo: José, hijo de David, no temas recibir a María tu mujer, porque lo engendrado en ella, del Espíritu Santo es.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And she will bear a son, and you shall call His name Jesus, for it is He who will save His people from their sins.
output: Y dará a luz un hijo, y llamarás Su nombre Jesús, porque Él salvará a Su pueblo de sus pecados.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Now all this has happened so that what was spoken by the Lord through the prophet might be fulfilled, saying,
output: Todo esto aconteció para que se cumpliese lo dicho por el Señor por medio del profeta, cuando dijo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: “Behold, the virgin shall be with child and shall bear a son, and they shall call His name Emmanuel” (which is translated, God with us).
output: “He aquí, una virgen estará encinta y dará a luz un hijo, y llamarán Su nombre Emanuel” (que traducido es: Dios con nosotros).

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when Joseph awoke from his sleep, he did as the angel of the Lord commanded him and took to himself his wife.
output: Y despertando José del sueño, hizo como el ángel del Señor le había mandado, y recibió a su mujer.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And he did not know her until she bore a son. And he called His name Jesus.
output: Y no la conoció hasta que dio a luz un hijo; y le puso por nombre Jesús.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul, a prisoner of Christ Jesus, and Timothy the brother, to Philemon our beloved and fellow worker
output: Pablo, prisionero de Cristo Jesús, y el hermano Timoteo, al amado Filemón, colaborador nuestro,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And to Apphia the sister and to Archippus our fellow soldier and to the church, which is in your house:
output: y a la hermana Apia, y a Arquipo nuestro compañero de milicia, y a la iglesia, que está en tu casa:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
output: Gracia y paz a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre y del Señor Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I thank my God always, making mention of you in my prayers,
output: Siempre doy gracias a mi Dios, haciendo mención de ti en mis oraciones,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Hearing of your love and the faith which you have toward the Lord Jesus and to all the saints,
output: porque oigo del amor y de la fe que tienes hacia el Señor Jesús, y para con todos los santos;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That the fellowship of your faith may become effective in the full knowledge of every good thing which is in you for Christ.
output: para que la comunión de tu fe sea eficaz en el pleno conocimiento de todo el bien que está en vosotros por Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For I had much joy and encouragement over your love, because the inward parts of the saints have been refreshed through you, brother.
output: Pues tengo gran gozo y consolación por tu amor, porque por ti, oh hermano, han sido confortadas las partes internas de los santos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore though I have much boldness in Christ to charge you what is fitting,
output: Por lo cual, aunque tengo mucha libertad en Cristo para mandarte lo que conviene,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because of love I rather entreat, being such a one as Paul the aged and now also a prisoner of Christ Jesus.
output: más bien te ruego por amor, siendo como soy, Pablo ya anciano, y ahora, además, prisionero de Cristo Jesús;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I entreat you concerning my child, whom I have begotten in my bonds, Onesimus,
output: te ruego por mi hijo Onésimo, a quien engendré en mis prisiones,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who formerly was useless to you but now is useful both to you and to me.
output: el cual en otro tiempo te fue inútil, pero ahora a ti y a mí nos es útil,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Him I have sent back to you — him, that is, my very heart —
output: el cual te devuelvo, es decir, te devuelvo mi propio corazón.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Whom I intended to keep with myself that on your behalf he might minister to me in the bonds of the gospel.
output: Yo quisiera retenerle conmigo, para que en lugar tuyo me ministrase en mis prisiones por el evangelio;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But without your mind I did not want to do anything, that your goodness would not be as of necessity, but voluntary.
output: pero nada quise hacer sin tu consentimiento, para que tu bondad no fuese como de necesidad, sino voluntaria.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For perhaps for this reason he was separated from you for but an hour, that you might fully have him forever,
output: Porque quizás para esto estuvo apartado de ti por poco tiempo, para que por siempre le tuvieras;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: No longer as a slave, but above a slave, a beloved brother, especially to me, but how much more to you, both in the flesh and in the Lord.
output: no ya como esclavo, sino como más que esclavo, como hermano amado, mayormente para mí, pero cuánto más para ti, tanto en la carne como en el Señor.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: If then you hold me as a partner, receive him as myself.
output: Así que, si me tienes por compañero, recíbele como a mí mismo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And if he has wronged you in anything or owes anything, charge that to my account.
output: Y si en algo te hizo daño, o te debe, ponlo a mi cuenta.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Yes, brother, may I have profit from you in the Lord; refresh my inward parts in Christ.
output: Sí, hermano, tenga yo algún provecho de ti en el Señor; conforta en Cristo mis partes internas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Having confidence in your obedience, I have written to you, knowing that you will do even beyond the things that I say.
output: Te he escrito confiando en tu obediencia, sabiendo que harás aún más de lo que te digo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And at the same time also prepare me a lodging, for I hope that through your prayers I will be graciously given to you.
output: Y al mismo tiempo prepárame también alojamiento; porque espero que por vuestras oraciones os seré concedido.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Epaphras, my fellow prisoner in Christ Jesus, greets you;
output: Te saludan Epafras, mi compañero de prisiones en Cristo Jesús,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: As do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, Luke, my fellow workers.
output: Marcos, Aristarco, Demas y Lucas, mis colaboradores.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit.
output: La gracia del Señor Jesucristo sea con vuestro espíritu..

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus, to all the saints in Christ Jesus who are in Philippi, with the overseers and deacons:
output: Pablo y Timoteo, esclavos de Cristo Jesús, a todos los santos en Cristo Jesús que están en Filipos, con los que vigilan y los diáconos:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
output: Gracia y paz a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre y del Señor Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I thank my God upon all my remembrance of you,
output: Doy gracias a mi Dios siempre que me acuerdo de vosotros,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Always in my every petition on behalf of you all, making my petition with joy,
output: siempre en todas mis peticiones orando con gozo por todos vosotros,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For your fellowship unto the furtherance of the gospel from the first day until now,
output: por vuestra comunión en el progreso del evangelio, desde el primer día hasta ahora;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Being confident of this very thing, that He who has begun in you a good work will complete it until the day of Christ Jesus;
output: confiando en esto, que el que comenzó en vosotros una buena obra, la perfeccionará hasta el día de Cristo Jesús;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as it is right for me to think this concerning you all because you have me in your heart, since both in my bonds and in the defense and confirmation of the gospel you are all fellow partakers with me of grace.
output: como me es justo pensar esto de todos vosotros, por cuanto me tenéis en el corazón; pues tanto en mis prisiones como en la defensa y confirmación del evangelio, todos vosotros sois participantes conmigo de la gracia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For God is my witness how I long after you all in the inward parts of Christ Jesus.
output: Porque Dios me es testigo de cómo os añoro a todos vosotros en las partes internas de Cristo Jesús.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And this I pray, that your love may abound yet more and more in full knowledge and all discernment,
output: Y esto pido en oración, que vuestro amor abunde aún más y más en pleno conocimiento y en todo discernimiento,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So that you may approve by testing the things which differ and are more excellent, that you may be pure and without offense unto the day of Christ,
output: para que pongáis a prueba y aprobéis las cosas que difieren por su excelencia, a fin de que seáis puros y sin ofensa para el día de Cristo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Being filled with the fruit of righteousness, which is through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.
output: llenos del fruto de justicia, que es por medio de Jesucristo, para gloria y alabanza de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Now I want you to know, brothers, that the things concerning me have turned out rather to the advancement of the gospel,
output: Ahora bien, quiero que sepáis, hermanos, que las cosas que me han sucedido, han redundado más bien en el avance del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So that my bonds have become manifest as being in Christ among the whole Praetorian guard and to all the rest.
output: de tal manera que se ha hecho patente en toda la guardia pretoriana y a todos los demás, que me hallo en cadenas por Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And most of the brothers, being confident in the Lord because of my bonds, are more exceedingly bold to speak the word of God without fear.
output: Y la mayoría de los hermanos, con confianza en el Señor por mis prisiones, se atreven mucho más a hablar la palabra de Dios sin temor.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Some preach Christ even because of envy and strife, and some also because of good will,
output: Algunos predican a Cristo por envidia y contienda; pero otros de buena voluntad;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These out of love, knowing that I am set for the defense of the gospel.
output: éstos lo hacen por amor, sabiendo que estoy puesto para la defensa del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But the others announce Christ out of selfish ambition, not purely, thinking to raise up affliction in my bonds.
output: pero aquéllos anuncian a Cristo por ambición egoísta, no con intenciones puras, pensando añadir aflicción a mis prisiones.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: What then? Only that in every way, whether in pretense or in truthfulness, Christ is announced; and in this I rejoice; yes, and I will rejoice;
output: ¿Qué, pues? Que no obstante, de todas maneras, o por pretexto o con veracidad, Cristo es anunciado; y en esto me gozo; sí, me gozaré aún.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For I know that for me this will turn out to salvation through your petition and the bountiful supply of the Spirit of Jesus Christ,
output: Porque sé que por vuestra petición y la abundante suministración del Espíritu de Jesucristo, esto resultará en mi salvación,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: According to my earnest expectation and hope that in nothing I will be put to shame, but with all boldness, as always, even now Christ will be magnified in my body, whether through life or through death.
output: conforme a mi anhelo y esperanza de que en nada seré avergonzado; antes bien con toda confianza, como siempre, ahora también será magnificado Cristo en mi cuerpo, o por vida o por muerte.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For to me, to live is Christ and to die is gain.
output: Porque para mí el vivir es Cristo, y el morir es ganancia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But if I am to live in the flesh, if this to me is fruit for my work, then I do not know what I will choose.
output: Mas si el vivir en la carne resulta para mí en una labor fructífera, no sé entonces qué escogeré.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But I am constrained between the two, having the desire to depart and be with Christ, for this is far better;
output: Porque de ambas cosas estoy puesto en estrecho, teniendo deseo de partir y estar con Cristo, pues esto es muchísimo mejor;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But to remain in the flesh is more necessary for your sake.
output: pero quedar en la carne es más necesario por causa de vosotros.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And being confident of this, I know that I will remain and continue with you all for your progress and joy of the faith,
output: Y confiando en esto, sé que quedaré, y aún permaneceré con todos vosotros, para vuestro progreso y gozo de la fe,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That your boast may abound in Christ Jesus in me through my coming again to you.
output: para que abunde vuestra gloria de mí en Cristo Jesús con mi venida otra vez a vosotros.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Only, conduct yourselves in a manner worthy of the gospel of Christ, that whether coming and seeing you or being absent, I may hear of the things concerning you, that you stand firm in one spirit, with one soul striving together along with the faith of the gospel,
output: Solamente que os comportéis como es digno del evangelio de Cristo, para que o sea que vaya a veros, o que esté ausente, oiga de vosotros que estáis firmes en un mismo espíritu, combatiendo unánimes junto con la fe del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And in nothing being frightened by the opposers, which is to them a proof of their destruction, but of your salvation, and that from God;
output: y en nada intimidados por los que se oponen, que para ellos ciertamente es indicio de destrucción, mas para vosotros de salvación; y esto de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because to you it has been graciously granted on behalf of Christ not only to believe into Him but also to suffer on His behalf,
output: Porque a vosotros os es concedido a causa de Cristo, no sólo que creáis *en Él, sino también que padezcáis por Él,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Having the same struggle which you saw in me and now hear to be in me.
output: teniendo el mismo conflicto que habéis visto en mí, y ahora oís que hay en mí.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The revelation of Jesus Christ which God gave to Him to show to His slaves the things that must quickly take place; and He made it known by signs, sending it by His angel to His slave John,
output: La revelación de Jesucristo, que Dios le dio, para mostrar a Sus esclavos las cosas que deben suceder pronto; y la declaró en señales enviándola por medio de Su ángel a Su esclavo Juan,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who testified the word of God and the testimony of Jesus Christ, even all that he saw.
output: que ha dado testimonio de la palabra de Dios, y del testimonio de Jesucristo, de todas las cosas que ha visto.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Blessed is he who reads and those who hear the words of the prophecy and keep the things written in it, for the time is near.
output: Bienaventurado el que lee, y los que oyen las palabras de esta profecía, y guardan las cosas en ella escritas; porque el tiempo está cerca.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: John to the seven churches which are in Asia: Grace to you and peace from Him who is and who was and who is coming, and from the seven Spirits who are before His throne,
output: Juan, a las siete iglesias que están en Asia: Gracia y paz a vosotros de parte de Aquel que es y que era y que ha de venir, y de los siete Espíritus que están delante de Su trono;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And from Jesus Christ, the faithful Witness, the Firstborn of the dead, and the Ruler of the kings of the earth. To Him who loves us and has released us from our sins by His blood
output: y de Jesucristo, el Testigo fiel, el Primogénito de entre los muertos, y el Soberano de los reyes de la tierra. Al que nos ama, y nos liberó de nuestros pecados con Su sangre,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And made us a kingdom, priests to His God and Father, to Him be the glory and the might forever and ever. Amen.
output: e hizo de nosotros un reino, sacerdotes para Su Dios y Padre; a Él sea gloria e imperio por los siglos de los siglos. Amén.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
